violations.description: Food display and service. — --Reach-in prep cooler food temperatures (diced tomatos, dressings)top and bottom tested at 48 F.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found at 200ppm Chlorine.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Prep table bottom hot dogs found at 48F. *Stated as issue with shut down a power outage adjustment during set up. Items are expected to be sold out by end of service.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found at greater than 100ppm Chlorine.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Cold hold is not at 41F or less. Top prep table 50F, Bottom Sauce 54F.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
